description: Normalized competitor comparison data keyed by query spec. Covers roll labels, folding cartons, and stand-up pouches. Each query maps to a set of competitor results. Internal label prices are calculated from LABEL_SALES_TIERS. Internal box/pouch prices are pending model documentation.

roll_labels.note: Matte and Gloss lamination are included in frame price. Soft Touch adds 10%. Holo adds flat $20.

folding_cartons.note: Internal pricing model pending documentation. Flow: 15K → Nobelus lamination → Scodix (optional) → Moll Cutter → Moll Folder-Gluer. Pricing depends on flat sheet size, substrate (14pt–24pt cardstock), coating, and run length.

stand_up_pouches.note: Internal pricing model pending documentation. Flow: 6K press → GM Die-Cutter (lamination) → Karlville Poucher. Pricing depends on pouch dimensions, gusset, material (BOPP/white/clear/foil), and quantity.

our_price.note: Matte lamination included in frame price. 36 fits/frame = floor(12/3.24) × floor(39/3.24) = 3 × 12.

closest_data_point.description: Roll Labels 3"×3" Square-Rounded, White BOPP, Clear Gloss Laminate Indoor, 5,000 qty
closest_data_point.spec_delta: finish=Clear Gloss (only finish available for this shape+size+paper combination)

competitor_results.notes: Playwright session capture via /service/rest/v1/products/300158845/prices. Shape=4 (Square-Rounded), size=452 (3x3), paper=12 (White BOPP), finish=1 (Clear Gloss Indoor). Full price table captured 100-15k qty. Shipping not included. Previous upload wall blocker is resolved — material and finish selects enabled after shape+size selection. NOTE: Matte finish is NOT available for this spec — only Clear Gloss Laminate (Indoor) offered for Square-Rounded 3×3 White BOPP.

closest_data_point.description: Custom labels starting price (any size)

competitor_results.notes: $47 starting price from JSON-LD AggregateOffer. Free shipping, 4-day turnaround included. Upload-first site — no configure-then-price path. 5k pricing requires manual quote with artwork upload.

queries.comparison_notes: PRIMARY BENCHMARK. Our price $694.44 vs UPrinting confirmed $505.85 — we are 37% more expensive. VP directional at $544.86 (unconfirmed size). GotPrint spec 100% confirmed but price wall-blocked. Axiom no 3x3 option. SM upload-first.

competitor_results.notes: Antd dropdown capture. 3"×4" Rectangle (closest to 3×3 — no 3×3 available). 2500 qty = $277.76. Standard turnaround.

queries.comparison_notes: Axiom 3"×4"/2500: $277.76. CLOSEST TO BENCHMARK — Axiom max std qty=2500 (5k = custom quote).

all_captured_price_points.description: Index of all individual price points. See competitor-pricing-datacenter.html for interactive view. Updated 2026-04-18: added GotPrint live pricing (3x3 Clear Gloss Indoor all qtys), Axiom 3x4 (250-2500), Axiom 2x3 intermediate qtys, UPrinting 2x3 and 4x4 sizes.

points.note: Rounded Square default size — size not confirmed
DIRECTIONAL — W=3/H=3 injected into Cimpress, size not DOM-confirmed
Starting price only — free shipping included
Via Ant Design dropdown, confirmed screenshot

roll_labels.gap: Partially resolved: live pricing is now captured via /service/rest/v1/products/300158845/prices for shape=4 (Square-Rounded), size=452 (3x3), paper=12 (White BOPP), finish=1 (Clear Gloss Indoor). The original blocker pattern was reactive configurator sequencing, not a permanent upload wall. Remaining gap: capture the exact Matte variant (finish=3) for the same spec. Full table captured for the clear-gloss path: 100/$76.28, 250/$86.16, 500/$123.00, 1k/$148.91, 2.5k/$226.86, 5k/$356.80, 10k/$618.83.
Upload-first site — no configure-then-price path. Only $47 starting price available. Manual quote with placeholder artwork needed for real qty pricing.
3x3/5k size not DOM-confirmed. $544.86 is directional from API injection. Need DevTools session to verify Custom Width/Height selections in Cimpress XHR.
PARTIAL — no 3×3 in standard configurator. Captured: 2×3 (250/500/1k/2.5k) and 3×4 (250/500/1k/2.5k) via Antd dropdown. Max std qty=2500. 5k+ requires custom quote.

PENDING APPROVAL — Trade account registered as info@pixelpressprint.com on 2026-04-19 at api.quadlabels.com/customer/login. Login returns approval-pending message (messageKey: 'reject' = waiting, not denied). Open endpoints confirmed: config, PAPER/SYNTHETIC/SILVER product catalog. No price endpoints are open (all /open/ pricing routes return 404). Full 13-product catalog intel captured in capture-quadlabels-2026-04-19.json. Capture script ready at scripts/capture-quadlabels-authenticated.js — will auto-run 19-spec benchmark suite (3x3/2x2/2x3/4x4/2x4 × multiple qtys) once account approved.

folding_cartons.note: UPrinting + Packola pricing captured for all 5 qty tiers (250-2500 pcs). Both exact 4"×2"×5" spec confirmed. Need: GotPrint, Axiom, and other packaging-specialist competitors.
Internal HP 15K pricing model not yet documented — cannot calculate our_price for comparison.

stand_up_pouches.note: UPrinting exact-spec pricing captured (100-5000 pcs). Packola Medium (~4"×6") directional pricing added (250-5000 pcs). Packola does not offer 100 pcs minimum. Need: exact Packola 4.375"×6"×2" spec confirmation.
Internal Karlville poucher pricing model not yet documented.

coverage_status_legend.live: Verified exact-spec price from configurator/API interaction
coverage_status_legend.partial: Some data captured but not for exact spec (reference anchor, starting price, or directional API result)
coverage_status_legend.blocked: Site requires upload or authenticated session; no automated price capture possible
coverage_status_legend.manual_required: Requires manual browser interaction or direct vendor inquiry

competitor_notes.vistaprint_packaging: Vistaprint does NOT offer folding cartons or stand-up pouches. All packaging URLs 404.
competitor_notes.gotprint_packaging: GotPrint does not offer folding cartons or pouches (catalog discovery confirmed, only "Folders" = presentation folders).
competitor_notes.stickermule_packaging: Sticker Mule: custom labels only. No folding cartons or pouches.
competitor_notes.packaging_competitor_landscape: For boxes and pouches, UPrinting is currently the only confirmed benchmark. Other dedicated suppliers (Packlane, noissue, PrintingForLess) would need separate exploration.
competitor_notes.gotprint_roll_labels: GotPrint roll labels are no longer fully blocked. A live pricing capture now exists for 3x3 Square-Rounded, White BOPP, Clear Gloss via /service/rest/v1/products/300158845/prices after the correct configurator sequence. Remaining gap: capture the exact Matte finish for the same spec and document the precise session/configuration steps that unlock that request.
competitor_notes.stickermule_roll_labels: Upload-first confirmed. $47 starting price from JSON-LD. 5k pricing requires manual quote with artwork upload.
competitor_notes.packola_boxes: Packola STE boxes: exact 4"×2"×5" spec captured at 250/500/1000/2000/2500 qty. Dimensions confirmed via L/W/D input fields. Price via DOM extraction from product page calculator.
competitor_notes.packola_pouches: Packola stand-up pouches: Medium (~4"×6") is closest to our 4.375"×6"×2" spec. Captured at 250/500/1000/2500/5000 qty. Directional — exact Packola dimensions not configurable (predefined size tiers).
competitor_notes.quadlabels_roll_labels: PENDING APPROVAL. Trade account registered info@pixelpressprint.com on 2026-04-19. API returns approval-pending (messageKey: reject = awaiting admin review, not a permanent denial). Company: Quadriga USA, 28410 Witherspoon Pkwy, Valencia CA. Products: 13 label types incl. SYNTHETIC (White BOPP equiv), CLEAR, GOLD, HOLOGRAPHIC, SECURITY SEAL, THERMAL. Config: min 100 pcs, max 100M, setup fee $5/version under 500 pcs, custom die $140, rush 30%, UPS flat $50, tax 9.75%. Capture script ready to run on approval: scripts/capture-quadlabels-authenticated.js.
competitor_notes.pricing_pipeline_context: This Pulse dataset is the continuation of the original Print Group competitor-pricing pipeline: PRI-7 umbrella, PRI-8 live capture, PRI-9 workaround execution moved into Pulse as PUL-30, PRI-10 normalization, PRI-11 Pulse display. Keep new captures and notes compatible with that downstream normalization/display chain.
